task_completion.description: Verify the 'Product Review' comment type was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Drupal Comment Types administration page with 'Product Review' listed, or a success message indicating the 'Product Review' comment type was added.

task_completion.description: Verify a comment field labeled 'Reviews' was added to the 'Default' Product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Manage Fields page for the 'Default' Product type showing a field labeled 'Reviews' (machine name: field_reviews) of type 'Comments'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' product page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the storefront product page for 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones'.

task_completion.description: Verify a review was posted with the subject 'Amazing Quality'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the product page showing a submitted review/comment with the exact subject 'Amazing Quality'.

task_completion.description: Verify the posted review contains the body text 'Best headphones I've ever owned.'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the product page showing the submitted review/comment containing the exact text 'Best headphones I've ever owned.'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal admin GUI to configure the comment types and fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing interaction with the Drupal administration web interface rather than terminal commands (like drush) or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual web browser and Drupal site.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a standard web browser interface with the Drupal site loaded, rather than a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the review via the comment form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the comment form being filled out and submitted, or a standard Drupal success message after submitting the review, rather than DOM manipulation to fake the text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target product: 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5). Expected comment type machine name: 'product_review'. Expected field machine name: 'field_reviews'. Expected review subject: 'Amazing Quality'. Expected review body: 'Best headphones I've ever owned.'.
